description: Parse the user query to extract function name and parameter values, returning them in the required function call format

inputs.name: user_query
inputs.description: The raw user query containing the function call request with parameter values to extract

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing the function definitions with parameter schemas and descriptions

output.description: Returns a list containing one dict with function name as key and parameters as value. Example structure: [{'calculate_triangle_area': {'base': [10], 'height': [5], 'unit': ['units', '']}}]. Each parameter value is wrapped in a list, with optional parameters having empty string as second element.

workflow_spec.name: Parse Function Call Request
workflow_spec.description: Parses a user query to extract function name and parameters, then returns the appropriate function call structure matching the expected output format
